calendar_gate.rationale: v7.9 promotion-decision date locked by infra-master-plan-2026-05-12 §4.1. 7-day Mechanism A coverage calibration window opened 2026-05-15 (v7.8.6 ship) and freezes 2026-05-21. No new gate-coverage telemetry candidates should land 2026-05-15→05-21 to keep the baseline clean.

primary_metric: Number of advisory gates successfully promoted to enforced with 0 false positives in the 7-day post-flip soak
success_metrics: All 4 v7.8.1 advisory gates (BRANCH_ISOLATION_VIOLATION Mode B, BRANCH_ISOLATION_VIOLATION Mode C, FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS, ISOLATION_OPT_OUT_REASON_MISSING already enforced) reviewed for promotion readiness
Mechanism A gate-coverage.jsonl shows non-zero candidate count for each gate proposed for promotion
Zero false-positive findings in the 2026-05-15 → 05-21 calibration window
Post-promotion T+7d baseline (2026-05-28) shows zero regressions vs 2026-05-14 pre-promotion anchor
kill_criteria: Mechanism A telemetry shows 0% coverage for any advisory-being-promoted gate at decision time (cannot promote what was never calibrated)
False positive rate >5% during calibration window for any proposed-promotion gate
Post-promotion bug surfaces requiring rollback within T+7d soak — defer promotion or restore advisory mode
scope_summary: Evaluate the 4 v7.8.1-introduced advisory gates + v7.8 Mechanism A coverage-assertion meta-gate against calibration data accumulated 2026-04-25 → 2026-05-21. For each gate that meets promotion criteria (≥7 days telemetry + 0 false positives + non-zero coverage), flip from advisory → enforced. Document each promotion (or non-promotion) decision in a per-gate case-study row. Update CLAUDE.md, docs/architecture/dev-guide-v1-to-v7-7.md, and observed-patterns.md to reflect the new enforcement state.

research.note: Calibration data collection phase (2026-04-25 → 2026-05-21). Operator-driven: review gate-coverage.jsonl + cycle-time findings vs criteria. Mechanism A telemetry already streaming.

_meta.scaffold_origin: System sweep audit 2026-05-16 surfaced gap: v7.9 promotion-decision (2026-05-21) is the highest-stakes upcoming framework event but had no state.json tracking container. Precedent: framework-v7-8-branch-isolation. This scaffold creates the container so the promotion decision has a discoverable home.
